_instructions: 2. Create a new shop and get your Shop ID and API Key
4. Copy this file to cryptocloud.json and fill in your credentials
5. Set enabled to true to activate cryptocurrency payments

_notes.enabled: Set to true to enable CryptoCloud payments
_notes.shopId: Your shop ID from CryptoCloud dashboard
_notes.apiKey: Your API key from CryptoCloud dashboard
_notes.testMode: Set to false for production, true for testing
